# Copilot Instructions for DigitalOcean.Net

## Build, Test, and Lint

```bash
# Build entire solution (all 5 target frameworks)
dotnet build DigitalOcean.Net.slnx

# Build release
dotnet build --configuration Release

# Run all tests
dotnet test tests/DigitalOcean.Net.Tests

# Run a single test by name
dotnet test tests/DigitalOcean.Net.Tests --filter "FullyQualifiedName~Create_WithValidToken"

# Check code formatting
dotnet format --verify-no-changes

# Fix formatting
dotnet format

# Pack NuGet package
dotnet pack src/DigitalOcean.Net/DigitalOcean.Net.csproj --configuration Release --output nupkg
```

## Architecture

This is a .NET client library for the full DigitalOcean API (40+ resource categories). It combines **Kiota-generated code** with a thin **hand-written wrapper layer**.

### Generated Code (`src/DigitalOcean.Net/Generated/`)

- ~1800 files auto-generated by [Microsoft Kiota](https://github.com/microsoft/kiota) v1.30.0 from `openapi/DigitalOcean-public.v2.yaml`
- **Never edit these files manually** — regenerate with Kiota instead
- The `.editorconfig` disables all analyzers for `**/Generated/**/*.cs`
- Entry point: `DigitalOceanApiClient` class, all API resources accessed via `client.V2.*`

To regenerate:
```bash
kiota generate --language CSharp --openapi openapi/DigitalOcean-public.v2.yaml --output src/DigitalOcean.Net/Generated --namespace-name DigitalOcean.Net.Generated --class-name DigitalOceanApiClient --exclude-backward-compatible --clean-output
```

### Hand-Written Wrapper Layer (5 files)

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `DigitalOceanClientFactory.cs` | Factory with `Create()`, `CreateFromAppData()`, `CreateFromConfigFile()` |
| `DigitalOceanClientOptions.cs` | Options: Token, BaseUrl, Timeout, UserAgent |
| `Authentication/DigitalOceanAuthProvider.cs` | Bearer token auth via `IAuthenticationProvider` |
| `Extensions/ServiceCollectionExtensions.cs` | `AddDigitalOceanClient()` DI extension methods |

### Multi-Target Framework

Targets: `netstandard2.0`, `netstandard2.1`, `net8.0`, `net9.0`, `net10.0`. Conditional dependencies exist for older frameworks — `System.Text.Json` and `Microsoft.Bcl.AsyncInterfaces` are only added for netstandard targets.

## Key Conventions

- **Solution format**: `.slnx` (not `.sln`) — requires .NET 10 SDK
- **TreatWarningsAsErrors** is enabled globally in `Directory.Build.props`
- **XML doc comments** are required (`GenerateDocumentationFile=true`) — bilingual (English + Chinese) on all public APIs
- **SourceLink** is enabled — all builds are deterministic
- **README** has 4 language versions: `README.md` (EN), `README.zh-CN.md`, `README.ja-JP.md`, `README.fr-FR.md` — keep all in sync when editing docs
- **`.gitignore` quirk**: A negation `!src/DigitalOcean.Net/Generated/**` at the end overrides default `[Ll]ogs/` and `Backup*` rules that would otherwise exclude generated API client directories named `Logs/` or `Backups/`
- **Version** is set in `src/DigitalOcean.Net/DigitalOcean.Net.csproj` (`<Version>` property) — update it there when releasing
- **CI** publishes to both NuGet.org and GitHub Packages on tag push (`v*`)
